grading_points.description: Correctly applies the LC frequency formula f = 1/(2π√LC) to determine that decreasing frequency requires increasing inductance L. Identifies that switching to position a increases coil turns, thus increasing L, and selects 'a'.

Correctly applies the LC frequency formula to determine that increasing frequency requires decreasing capacitance C. Uses the capacitor formula C ∝ S to conclude that reducing plate area decreases C, and selects 'clockwise' rotation.
